query:
-- Check fraud_risk_score distribution for NULL fraud_risk_level rows
SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN fraud_risk_score IS NULL THEN 'no_score'
    WHEN fraud_risk_score < 20 THEN '0-20 (low)'
    WHEN fraud_risk_score < 40 THEN '20-40 (medium-low)'
    WHEN fraud_risk_score < 60 THEN '40-60 (medium)'
    WHEN fraud_risk_score < 80 THEN '60-80 (high)'
    ELSE '80-100 (critical)'
  END as score_band,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM ai_assessments 
WHERE fraud_risk_level IS NULL
GROUP BY score_band
ORDER BY MIN(fraud_risk_score);
